citations.title: Unsafe Amplification Controls
citations.excerpt: When unverified high-risk content is predicted to spread rapidly, apply proportionate friction before removal, including context labels, source requirements, distribution throttling, or temporary trend eligibility pauses.
citations.objective: Prevent Viral Spread of Unverified Claims

citations.title: Civic and Public Safety Claims
citations.excerpt: Claims about voting access, emergency services, public safety, or official procedures require authoritative sources. Unverified claims should receive source friction and human review when reach risk is elevated.
citations.objective: Enforce Authoritative Verification for Election & Civic Integrity

citations.title: Coordinated Amplification Signals
citations.excerpt: Content with synchronized engagement, repeated phrasing, unusual share-to-like ratios, or clusters of recently created accounts must be reviewed for coordinated amplification before distribution expands.
citations.objective: Mitigate Inauthentic Engagement & Automated Bots

citations.title: Search Grounding #1
citations.excerpt: Vijay and Trisha's appearance at a Chennai wedding has reignited years-old relationship rumours. Here's a look at every moment that fuelled speculation about the actors' equation over the years and what Vijay's wife said in divorce plea.
citations.retrievalReason: Real-time web grounding for content context.

citations.title: Search Grounding #2
citations.excerpt: Another notable development is a ring that Trisha has been flaunting since 2022, raising speculations of having somebody special in her life. Neither Trisha nor Vijay has mentioned anything about their relationship, but a lot of the veteran actress' social media activity and personal updates have had too much coincidence around them.
citations.retrievalReason: Real-time web grounding for content context.

citations.title: Search Grounding #3
citations.excerpt: Thalapathy Vijay finally breaks silence on affair rumours with Trisha Krishnan, divorce from Sangeetha: 'You can't separate me from…' Actor-politician Thalapathy Vijay finally broke silence on Jana Nayagan's delay, divorce with wife Sangeetha Sornalingam and affair rumours with actress Trisha Krishnan.
citations.retrievalReason: Real-time web grounding for content context.

citations.title: Unsafe Amplification Controls
citations.excerpt: When unverified high-risk content is predicted to spread rapidly, apply proportionate friction before removal, including context labels, source requirements, distribution throttling, or temporary trend eligibility pauses.

citations.title: Coordinated Amplification Signals
citations.excerpt: Content with synchronized engagement, repeated phrasing, unusual share-to-like ratios, or clusters of recently created accounts must be reviewed for coordinated amplification before distribution expands.

citations.title: Civic and Public Safety Claims
citations.excerpt: Claims about voting access, emergency services, public safety, or official procedures require authoritative sources. Unverified claims should receive source friction and human review when reach risk is elevated.

citations.title: Explainable Enforcement
citations.excerpt: Every automated intervention must include the least restrictive action selected, policy citations, uncertainty level, an audit identifier, and a route for human appeal or rollback.

citations.title: Medical Claims and Harmful Advice
citations.excerpt: High-impact medical claims that promise cures, discourage professional care, or provide unsupported treatment guidance must be grounded in credible sources or escalated for review.
